mapper.insert: /* adm-user-user-sql-oracle.xml - mergeErpUserInfo */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_UR ( URKEY, URNM, URPW, EXP, GENDERTYPE, JOINDAY, QUITDAY, EMPLOYTYPE, WRKTYPE, DEPTKEY, DEPTNM, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT URKEY , URNM , #{urpw} , '203912312359' , CASE GENDERTYPE WHEN '1' THEN 'F' WHEN '3' THEN 'M' ELSE GENDERTYPE END AS GENDERTYPE , JOINDAY , QUITDAY , CASE EMPLOYTYPE WHEN '정규' THEN '1' WHEN '연봉' THEN '2' WHEN '임시' THEN '3' ELSE EMPLOYTYPE END AS EMPLOYTYPE , CASE WRKTYPE WHEN '1' THEN 'Y' WHEN '9' THEN 'N' ELSE WRKTYPE END AS WRKTYPE , DEPTKEY , DEPTNM , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_EAI_USR_BATCH WHERE TRN_ID = #{trnId} GROUP BY URKEY, URNM, GENDERTYPE, JOINDAY, QUITDAY, EMPLOYTYPE, WRKTYPE, DEPTKEY, DEPTNM ON CONFLICT (URKEY) DO UPDATE SET URNM = EXCLUDED.URNM, GENDERTYPE = EXCLUDED.GENDERTYPE, JOINDAY = EXCLUDED.JOINDAY, QUITDAY = EXCLUDED.QUITDAY, EMPLOYTYPE = EXCLUDED.EMPLOYTYPE, WRKTYPE = EXCLUDED.WRKTYPE, DEPTKEY = EXCLUDED.DEPTKEY, DEPTNM = EXCLUDED.DEPTNM, UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY
